# cache

```go
import "github.com/tagoro9/fotingo/internal/commands/cache"
```

Package cache contains cache\-command business logic shared by CLI adapters.

<a name="EntryView"></a>
## type [EntryView](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotin-go/blob/main/internal/commands/cache/workflow.go#L14-L23>)

EntryView is the view model used by cache command renderers and JSON output.

```go
type EntryView struct {
    Key        string `json:"key"`
    DisplayKey string `json:"-"`
    Value      string `json:"value"`
    Preview    string `json:"-"`
    Detail     string `json:"-"`
    Metadata   string `json:"metadata"`
    ExpiresAt  string `json:"expiresAt,omitempty"`
    SizeBytes  int    `json:"sizeBytes"`
}
```

<a name="BuildEntryViews"></a>
### func [BuildEntryViews](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotin-go/blob/main/internal/commands/cache/workflow.go#L41-L44>)

```go
func BuildEntryViews(entries []storecache.Entry, sensitive *regexp.Regexp) []EntryView
```

BuildEntryViews converts cache entries to display and JSON views.
